title: Fix updateCalendarPickerLabel for 3-state calendar selection
description:
Current state: updateCalendarPickerLabel() treats empty set as All calendars, cannot distinguish default from explicit-zero.

Desired state: 3 states displayed:
- calendars=null (never configured): All calendars
- calendars='' (explicitly chose none): No calendars selected (new string)
- calendars='1,2,3': N calendars selected

File: WidgetListConfigureActivity.kt:305-313
Pass isCalendarsConfigured() or similar flag so label can distinguish null from empty.

Also wire up the existing calendar_picker_warning_message view to show when 0 calendars selected.
